Class Drone

java.lang.Object
model.Drone
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Drone extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a drone
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    Description
    Drone(String id, double autonomy, double batteryLevel, double maxPayload, double speed, Position position)
    Creates a drone.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    canDoMission(Route route)
    Checks whether this drone has enough autonomy and battery to complete the given route.
    double
    getAutonomy()
    Returns the maximum range of the drone in km.
    double
    getBatteryLevel()
    Returns the current battery level (0-100).
    String

    double
    getMaxPayload()
    Returns the maximum payload the drone can carry in kg.
    Position
    getPosition()
     
    double
    getSpeed()
    Returns the drone speed in km/h.
    DroneStatus
    getStatus()
    Returns the current operational status.
    boolean

    Returns true if this drone is available for a mission.

    Sets the operational status of the drone.

    Updates the battery level.

    Updates the current position of the drone.

  • Constructor Details

    • Drone

      public Drone(String id, double autonomy, double batteryLevel, double maxPayload, double speed, Position position)
      Creates a drone.
      Parameters:
      id - unique identifier
      autonomy - maximum distance the drone can fly when fully charged
      maxPayload - maximum payload
      position - current position

  • Method Details

    • isAvailable

      public boolean isAvailable()
      Returns true if this drone is available for a mission.
      Returns:
      true if status is AVAILABLE

    • canDoMission

      public boolean canDoMission(Route route)
      Checks whether this drone has enough autonomy and battery to complete the given route.
      Parameters:
      route - the planned route
      Returns:
      true if the drone can complete the route

    • updatePosition

      public void updatePosition(Position position)
      Updates the current position of the drone.
      Parameters:
      position - new position

    • updateBatteryLevel

      public void updateBatteryLevel(double batteryLevel)
      Updates the battery level.
      Parameters:
      batteryLevel - new battery level (0-100)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if value is out of range

    • getSpeed

      public double getSpeed()
      Returns the drone speed in km/h.
      Returns:
      speed

    • getId

      public String getId()

    • getAutonomy

      public double getAutonomy()
      Returns the maximum range of the drone in km.
      Returns:
      autonomy in km

    • getBatteryLevel

      public double getBatteryLevel()
      Returns the current battery level (0-100).
      Returns:
      battery level as percentage

    • getMaxPayload

      public double getMaxPayload()
      Returns the maximum payload the drone can carry in kg.
      Returns:
      max payload in kg

    • getStatus

      public DroneStatus getStatus()
      Returns the current operational status.
      Returns:
      drone status

    • getPosition

      public Position getPosition()

    • setStatus

      public void setStatus(DroneStatus status)
      Sets the operational status of the drone.
      Parameters:
      status - new status

    • setSpeed

      public void setSpeed(double speed)
